warning_text_observed:
⚠️ 보안 경고
민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.
(This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)
notes: Rollback regression test for 'you' service. Initial nav to https://you.com/ redirected logged-in user to you.com/platform (developer dashboard); navigated explicitly to /chat?chatMode=default which initially loaded chat UI normally. After mandatory Ctrl+Shift+R hard reload, APF intercept fired at domain/page level: body content stripped and Korean security warning toast '⚠️ 보안 경고 / 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. / (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)' rendered in top-right. Expected_text '차단' visible. PII prompt was NOT submitted because page-replacement intercept fires pre-submission (no chat input remained) — mission anchor still satisfied since user cannot reach chat UI. Matches prior baseline behavior (#882 — same page-replacement delivery). Verdict=OK.
